items.title: ai-agent-architecture
items.summary: Build LLM systems you actually control. A free, open engineering book + course — from tokenization to serving your own models. Mechanisms, trade-offs, and numbers, not prompt tips
items.summary_cn: 构建您实际控制的LLM系统。一本免费、开放的工程书籍+课程--从令牌化到为您自己的模型服务。机制、权衡和数字，而不是提示提示
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: Predictor
items.summary: Open-source AI prediction engine for numerical data analysis and machine learning.
items.summary_cn: 用于数值数据分析和机器学习的开源AI预测引擎。
items.comment: 开源项目值得支持，文档和社区活跃度比 star 数更重要。

items.title: Automated Discovery Has No Universally Superior Harness
items.title_cn: 自动发现没有普遍卓越的线束
items.summary: Autonomous discovery systems such as OpenEvolve and TTT-Discover are often used as general-purpose harnesses. However, in practice these are composite systems combining several design choices about archives, parent selection, exploration, and budget allocation into a single recipe. Because discovery...
items.summary_cn: 像OpenEvolve和TTT-Discover这样的自主发现系统通常用作通用线束。然而，在实践中，这些是组合系统，将关于档案、父级选择、探索和预算分配的几个设计选择组合到一个配方中。因为发现...
items.comment: 法规来了，短期阵痛难免，长期看是行业走向成熟的必经之路。

items.title: Simple Domain Generalization for Strong Pixel-Level Image Tampering Detection in Modern VLMs
items.title_cn: 现代VLM中强像素级图像篡改检测的简单域泛化
items.summary: Modern vision-language models (VLMs) have significantly improved image generation and editing capabilities, making pixel-level image tampering detection increasingly important yet challenging under cross-model and out-of-distribution shifts. This work studies domain generalization for pixel-level im...
items.summary_cn: 现代视觉语言模型（ VLM ）显著改善了图像生成和编辑能力，使得像素级图像篡改检测在跨模型和分布式转换下变得越来越重要，但也具有挑战性。本工作研究像素级im的域泛化...
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Logical Judgments Under Pressure: Diagnosing Syllogistic Stability with Learned Soft Prefixes
items.title_cn: 压力下的逻辑判断：用学到的软前缀诊断三段稳定性
items.summary: To test how correct logical judgments respond to learned context, we prepend a soft prefix to an exactly labeled syllogistic reasoning benchmark while keeping the model fixed. Soft prefixes are opaque continuous vectors, so we characterize them through the behavior they induce across controlled vari...
items.summary_cn: 为了测试正确的逻辑判断对学习上下文的反应，我们在精确标记的三段论推理基准中添加了一个软前缀，同时保持模型固定。软前缀是不透明的连续向量，因此我们通过它们在受控变量中诱导的行为来表征它们...
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
items.title_cn: Anthropic具有里程碑意义的15亿美元版权和解获得批准
items.summary: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.
items.summary_cn: 最终批准解决了一起案件，但并未解决使用受版权保护的作品来训练人工智能模型的更广泛问题。
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Colossal Biosciences reportedly in talks to raise new capital at $20B–$30B valuation
items.title_cn: 据报道， Colossal Biosciences正在洽谈以200亿至300亿美元的估值筹集新资本
items.summary: The de-extinction startup is looking to double or triple its previous valuation, according to the report.
items.summary_cn: 根据该报告，这家物种灭绝初创公司希望将之前的估值提高一倍或三倍。
items.comment: 新论文发布，先别急着引用，等社区复现和讨论再说。

items.title: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
items.title_cn: 特朗普最新的人工智能沙皇已经辞职
items.summary: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.
items.summary_cn: 自大卫·萨克斯（ David Sacks ）离开沙皇职位以来，人工智能标准与创新中心（ CAISI ）的主管角色已成为一扇旋转门。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。
